conflict_description: Baseline fail-closed behavior collides with offline TTL exceptions on privileged update paths
resolution_rule: Fail-closed behavior takes precedence and exceptions are privileged and time-bounded
sequence_adjustment: Apply SOL-01 first then gate SOL-13 only on privileged update paths

conflict_description: Two blocking rules overlap for stale intelligence and can produce duplicate semantics
resolution_rule: SOL-01 sets global default and SOL-16 only escalates stale intelligence for privileged paths
sequence_adjustment: Apply SOL-01 first then add SOL-16 as stale-data escalation layer

conflict_description: Secret detection and secret quarantine can duplicate detectors and alerts
resolution_rule: SOL-02 handles detection and SOL-12 handles redaction and quarantine after detection
sequence_adjustment: Run SOL-02 before SOL-12 so detection feeds quarantine

conflict_description: Artifact freshness metadata and freshness SLA enforcement touch same trust boundary
resolution_rule: SOL-04 governs artifact presence and SOL-13 governs freshness exceptions and expiry
sequence_adjustment: Run SOL-04 before SOL-13 so freshness policy applies to present artifacts

conflict_description: Signed-feed retention and freshness governance can disagree on last-good snapshot acceptability
resolution_rule: Trust signed or pinned snapshots first then apply freshness actionability checks
sequence_adjustment: Run SOL-05 before SOL-13 so provenance is established before freshness gating

conflict_description: Executable misuse assertions and control-evidence matrix overlap in ML governance
resolution_rule: SOL-06 defines runtime controls and SOL-07 records evidence for those controls
sequence_adjustment: Run SOL-06 before SOL-07 so evidence maps to concrete assertions

conflict_description: Adversarial misuse assertions and adversarial thresholds can duplicate test intent
resolution_rule: SOL-06 defines coverage requirements and SOL-08 defines numeric pass thresholds for shared suite
sequence_adjustment: Use one shared adversarial harness with coverage then thresholds

conflict_description: Governance evidence and adversarial pass criteria can both block on same missing artifact
resolution_rule: Missing evidence must fail earlier than threshold evaluation
sequence_adjustment: Evaluate SOL-07 before SOL-08 so evidence gaps stop pipeline first

conflict_description: Prompt boundary sanitization and least-authority controls can be misread as substitutes
resolution_rule: Prompt defense is necessary but authorization remains mandatory
sequence_adjustment: Run SOL-09 before SOL-10 so hostile instructions are filtered before auth checks

conflict_description: Authorization scopes and diff-policy gates both control destructive edits and may duplicate approvals
resolution_rule: Authorization decides who can act and diff policy decides what content is acceptable
sequence_adjustment: Run SOL-10 before SOL-11 so identity and scope are checked before content policy

conflict_description: AI output policy checks and secret redaction can conflict if redaction happens too late
resolution_rule: Secret quarantine must occur before accepting patch into merge path
sequence_adjustment: Run SOL-12 before SOL-11 so secret handling precedes diff acceptance

conflict_description: Coverage sampling and action-threshold enforcement both shape risk outputs and can misorder gates
resolution_rule: Completeness checks must pass before threshold-based actions are evaluated
sequence_adjustment: Run SOL-14 before SOL-15 so scoring completeness is established first
